title: nepeta hederacea
intro: Nepeta hederacea, also known as wood betony, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is known to provide various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting better sleep. Nepeta hederacea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, infusions, and capsules, making it a versatile remedy for various ailments.
